Localization.Description: Remote access to a virtual machine

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} is connecting to the console of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} connected to the console of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to connect to the console of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} disconnected from the console of virtual machine "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
